name: JellyShim
overview: Performance optimization plugin — smaller assets, compressed images, smarter caching.
description: JellyShim optimizes your Jellyfin web client: JS/CSS/SVG minification, Brotli/Zstd/Gzip pre-compression, native image processing (AVIF/WebP/JPEG) with per-type settings, intelligent cache headers with ETag/304, Link preload/modulepreload/preconnect headers, CORS/CORP headers, and optional security headers. Zero external dependency — install, restart, done.

versions.changelog: Audit round 2: RFC 7232 §4.1 compliant 304 responses (ETag + Vary + Cache-Control on all 4 paths), fix _requestCount TOCTOU race in Interlocked.Increment, exclude HTML from AssetProcessor pre-optimization (FT compatibility), fix Plugin.Description and manifest descriptions, fix localization label consistency for FT bypass patterns, add zstd/ to DiskCacheManager XML docs. 206 tests.

Comprehensive audit & fixes: fix ffmpeg deadlock (async stderr + real timeout), fix inflight SemaphoreSlim race condition, serve compressed assets from memory (no disk re-read), fix ClearCacheByPrefix no-op prefixes, fix ETag invalidation overly broad matching, wire up compression savings tracking, stream-based ETag hashing, cache compiled FT bypass regexes. Architecture: deduplicate compression methods (PreCompressor static), deduplicate IsFileTransformationBypassed (shared FileTransformationMatcher), conservative JS minification (NUglify KeepAll), image stats tracking in middleware.
Fix config page CSS: move style block from head to body so custom styling is rendered by Jellyfin's plugin page loader. Improved card contrast, input focus states, and shadow visibility.

Major update — SVG minification, Zstd compression (3-tier: Brotli > Zstd > Gzip), performance stats dashboard with live cache/compression metrics, per-plugin cache clear API, security headers suite (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy), Link: rel=preconnect headers, redesigned admin UI (card-based layout, collapsible sections, live stats). 148 unit tests, 12 languages updated (110 keys).

Comprehensive File Transformation compatibility: auto-bypass ALL .chunk.js and .bundle.js files from pre-built cache when FT plugins are configured, ensuring HSS, Custom Tabs, and any FT plugin patches are always applied regardless of chunk filenames. Added /HomeScreen/ to default plugin asset paths for HSS controller-served JS/CSS caching.

Fix Home Screen Sections compatibility: skip NUglify minification for File Transformation captured files (FT-patched webpack bundles are already minified, and NUglify breaks HSS's injected generator code). Fix AVIF transparency: Logo and Art images (transparent PNGs) now force WebP encoding instead of AVIF (yuv420p discards alpha). Safety net: any image with alpha channel (32bpp) automatically falls back to WebP.

AVIF image encoding via ffmpeg: SVT-AV1 (preferred) and libaom-av1 dual encoder support. Auto-detects Jellyfin's configured ffmpeg path (EncodingOptions → JELLYFIN_FFMPEG env → system paths). New AVIF status panel in config page showing ffmpeg source and encoder. CRF quality clamping defense-in-depth. Comprehensive XML doc comments across entire codebase.

Fix critical deadlock: middleware was registered twice (ApplicationBuilderFactory + IStartupFilter), causing SemaphoreSlim deadlock on uncached plugin assets — web UI would hang on first load after restart. StartupFilter now skips if factory already injected.

Fix compatibility with File Transformation plugins (Custom Tabs, JellyfinEnhanced). Web assets patched by File Transformation (e.g. home-html.*.chunk.js) are now bypassed from JellyShim cache so runtime patches apply correctly. New config: File Transformation Bypass Patterns. Also adds per-key SemaphoreSlim to deduplicate concurrent plugin asset processing.

Resilient minification: NUglify non-fatal errors (invalid unicode-range tokens, strict-mode duplicate properties) no longer skip minification — output is used when valid and smaller. Fixes unminified third-party CSS (web fonts) and JS (KefinTweaks). 2 new unit tests (84 total).

Fix extensionless plugin asset compression (JellyfinEnhanced/script, JellyTweaks/script now served with Brotli/Gzip). Compress JSON plugin endpoints (public-config, Config). Inject font-display:swap into @font-face CSS rules to eliminate FOIT. 8 new unit tests (82 total).

Extensionless plugin endpoint optimization (e.g. /JellyfinEnhanced/script) via upstream Content-Type sniffing. Full i18n for config page with 12 languages (EN, FR, DE, ES, PT, IT, NL, RU, ZH, JA, KO, PL) — auto-detects Jellyfin locale with English fallback. Localization API at /JellyShim/Localization/{lang}. Removed dead code (AngleSharp, HtmlTransformer, FileTransformationBridge). Added 74 unit tests.

Fix: plugin asset corruption — strip Accept-Encoding before capturing upstream response so minification receives raw text instead of compressed binary. Adds Brotli/Gzip decompression fallback for edge cases. Fixes 'illegal character U+001B' errors on all third-party plugin scripts.

On-the-fly plugin asset optimization: third-party plugin JS/CSS (MediaBarEnhanced, JellyfinEnhanced, etc.) are now captured, minified, compressed (Brotli/Gzip), and cached on disk. New Clear Cache button in config page and scheduled task. ETag/304 support for cached plugin assets.

AVIF encoding via ffmpeg (zero install — uses Jellyfin's bundled libaom-av1), auto format negotiation AVIF > WebP > JPEG based on browser support, image optimization now covers ALL Jellyfin image endpoints including /emby/ and /mediabrowser/ prefixes and Artists, Genres, MusicGenres, Persons, Studios, Years entities. Removed SkiaSharp dependency. Compatible with KefinTweaks, Home Screen Sections, Media Bar Enhanced.

Fix: middleware no longer serves index.html from cache, allowing File Transformation plugins (Custom Tabs, JellyTweaks, Jellyfin Enhanced) to inject their HTML. Disable File Transformation integration by default to prevent conflicts.
Fix plugin version display (was always 0.0.0.0), fix config page save (PascalCase keys), fix IStartupFilter middleware injection, move e.preventDefault() before async code.

Fix middleware injection — replace IStartupFilter with custom IApplicationBuilderFactory that reliably injects middleware into the HTTP pipeline. Add diagnostic logging for middleware lifecycle. Config page now appears directly in the dashboard sidebar menu.
Fix config page: checkboxes and input fields now show correct default values on first load. Fix config save/load using camelCase keys for Jellyfin 10.11 System.Text.Json API.

AVIF image encoding support (auto-detected via SkiaSharp at runtime), format negotiation now prefers AVIF > WebP > JPEG in auto mode, default format changed to auto, fixed memory leak in image encoder, fixed Content-Type mismatch on runtimes without AVIF support.

Initial release: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native ImageSharp image optimization with 13 per-type settings, smart cache headers, Link preload headers, CORS/CORP, optional security headers, plugin asset support, File Transformation bridge.
